import math

def compute_discount(price, rate):
    discounted = price * (1.0 - rate)
    if math.isclose(discounted, 0.0, abs_tol=1e-9):
        return "free"
    elif math.isclose(discounted, 9.99, abs_tol=1e-9):
        return "special"
    return "normal"

def check_balance(account):
    interest = account["balance"] * 0.05
    new_balance = account["balance"] + interest
    if math.isclose(new_balance, 10000.0, rel_tol=1e-9):
        send_congratulations(account["owner"])
    return new_balance

def classify_measurement(raw_value):
    adjusted = raw_value * 2.54 + 0.001
    if abs(adjusted - 100.0) < 1e-6:
        return "metric"
    elif abs(adjusted - 50.0) < 1e-6:
        return "half"
    return "other"
